extra.message: CWE-78: Potential shell injection. User-controlled input is interpolated into a shell command via fmt.Sprintf. If the input contains shell metacharacters (single quotes, semicolons, backticks, $(...)) an attacker can execute arbitrary commands inside the container. Fix: write the code to a temp file using os.WriteFile and pass the file path as an argument to the interpreter — do not use "sh -c".

metadata.cwe: CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command

metadata.cwe: CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command

extra.message: CWE-755: The error from bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword is silently discarded. On failure (e.g. password too long) the returned slice is nil and the caller stores an empty hash, allowing the user to authenticate with any password. Fix: check the error and return it to the caller.

metadata.cwe: CWE-755: Improper Handling of Exceptional Conditions

extra.message: CWE-400: http.Server created without ReadHeaderTimeout or ReadTimeout. Without these the server is vulnerable to a Slowloris DoS attack where an attacker slowly sends HTTP headers to hold connections open indefinitely. Fix: add ReadHeaderTimeout (5s) and ReadTimeout (30s).
